description: Composition Cream sheer shirt made of a blended fabric with a soft drape, has a mandarin collar, full concealed buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, velvet tie-up detail at the neck, lace detailing at the back yoke, shoulder and cuffs, pin-tucks from the shoulder and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, reminiscent of a vintage vibe, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and pumps. For a formal or casual feel wear this with denims or formal pants. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
